opportunity_name: Older Americans Act Title III-B Supportive Services (via Area Agency on Aging)
funder_name: Administration for Community Living / California Department of Aging
deadline: Annual cycle through local AAA (typically Spring)
geographic_restrictions: Service area must align with AAA boundaries
mission_program_area: Information and referral, case management, transportation, in-home services
brief_justification: Title III accounts for 71.7% of OAA funding ($1.7B nationally). SNS I&R services directly align. Established track record important.
source_of_information: ACL website, Congressional Research Service reports
special_notes: Apply through Monterey County AAA or Santa Cruz County. AAA allocates $2M+ annually in grants.

opportunity_name: California Department of Aging - Bridge to Recovery (Round 3 Expected)
mission_program_area: Senior day services, congregate services, infection prevention, workforce development
brief_justification: Direct match to SNS mission. CDA administers $55.84M program for senior day services. SNS provides exactly these services. High alignment with state priorities.
source_of_information: California Department of Aging website, web research 2025-11-21
special_notes: Monitor for Round 3 announcement. Contact: bmbgrantanalyst@aging.ca.gov

opportunity_name: Monterey County Area Agency on Aging - OAA/OCA Service Contracts
funder_name: Monterey County Area Agency on Aging
mission_program_area: Information & assistance, outreach, health promotion, meals, caregiver support
brief_justification: AAA allocates $2M+ annually in grants. SNS services directly align with I&A, outreach. RFP process every 4 years.
special_notes: Contact: mcaaa@countyofmonterey.gov, Senior Helpline: (831) 755-4466

opportunity_name: Archstone Foundation - Capacity Building Grants
deadline: July 2025 LOI deadline (for 2025 cycle), August 21, 2025 full proposal
geographic_restrictions: California only - organizations serving older adults
mission_program_area: Organizational capacity building, operational improvements for senior-serving orgs
brief_justification: Archstone has 35+ years funding California aging organizations, $130M+ awarded. Capacity building perfect for SNS infrastructure.
special_notes: 35 years of CA aging grantmaking. $775K recently awarded. Focus on JEDI principles.

opportunity_name: Community Foundation Santa Cruz County - Community Grants (Seniors)
mission_program_area: Senior services, end-of-life care, human services
brief_justification: 33% of CFSCC funding allocated to Seniors, End-of-Life Care & Historic Preservation. SNS based in Soquel - local priority.
special_notes: $2M awarded in 2025 cycle. Strong local fit. Consider equity focus in application.

opportunity_name: ADRC Infrastructure Grants - Aging and Disability Resource Connection
geographic_restrictions: California only - must partner with AAA or ILC
mission_program_area: Coordinated networks for older adults, people with disabilities, caregivers
brief_justification: SNS provides information and referral services - core ADRC function. SB 80 established this program. Partnership opportunity with local AAA.
special_notes: Requires partnership with Area Agency on Aging. Contact Monterey or Santa Cruz County AAA.

opportunity_name: Santa Cruz County Area Agency on Aging - Service Contracts
funder_name: Santa Cruz County Area Agency on Aging
mission_program_area: Senior services, information assistance, health promotion
brief_justification: SNS home county AAA. Direct alignment with I&R and coordination services.
special_notes: Contact county human services for current contracting opportunities.

opportunity_name: Older Americans Act Title III-E Family Caregiver Support
funder_name: Administration for Community Living / California Department of Aging
geographic_restrictions: Service area must align with AAA boundaries
mission_program_area: Caregiver information, assistance, counseling, respite, training
brief_justification: Caregiver support aligns with SNS information and guidance services. Growing priority area.
special_notes: Caregiver support is expanding priority. RAISE Family Caregivers Act implementation.

opportunity_name: Santa Cruz County Human Services - CORE Investments
funder_name: Santa Cruz County Human Services Department
mission_program_area: Human services, basic needs, vulnerable populations
brief_justification: SNS based in Soquel (Santa Cruz County). County contracts for human services directly relevant.
special_notes: Check Centralized Contracting Unit for current RFPs.

opportunity_name: Local Aging & Disability Planning Grant (LADAP) - Round 3 Expected
mission_program_area: Age and disability-friendly community planning, cross-sector collaboration
brief_justification: Round 2 awarded $4M to 20 organizations. SNS serves multiple counties - strong fit for regional planning.
source_of_information: California Master Plan for Aging website
special_notes: Previous rounds supported 30 communities. Consider multi-county coalition approach.

opportunity_name: University Mound Old Ladies Home Foundation
mission_program_area: Senior services, disability services, older women
brief_justification: Database shows $35K to senior/disability services including Senior Disability Action. SF Bay Area focus. Avg grant $36K.
special_notes: Grants to Senior Disability Action, Older Women's League. CA-based funder.

opportunity_name: Community Foundation of Monterey County - Community Impact Grants
mission_program_area: Human services, health, community development
brief_justification: SNS serves Monterey County. Local community foundation with human services focus.
special_notes: Check website for current grant cycles and eligibility.

opportunity_name: Archstone Foundation - Integrated Care Program Grants
mission_program_area: Health/social services integration, CalAIM participation, data exchange
brief_justification: Archstone supporting CalAIM participation and data exchange. SNS could position for ECM/community supports.
special_notes: Recent $125K grant to Alzheimer's LA for CalAIM ECM. Consider similar positioning.

opportunity_name: Older Americans Act Title III-C Nutrition Services
funder_name: Administration for Community Living / California Department of Aging
geographic_restrictions: Service area must align with AAA boundaries
mission_program_area: Congregate meals, home-delivered meals, nutrition services
brief_justification: Nutrition services often bundled with I&R. SNS could partner or expand into nutrition coordination.
special_notes: Consider partnership with Meals on Wheels or nutrition provider.

opportunity_name: AARP Community Challenge Grants
mission_program_area: Livable communities, age-friendly improvements, quick-action projects
brief_justification: 2025 awarded 383 projects, $4.2M total. 12 CA organizations received $126,300. Smaller grants but accessible.
special_notes: ACC Senior Services Sacramento received garden grant. Good for specific project funding.

opportunity_name: Older Americans Act Title III-D Evidence-Based Disease Prevention
funder_name: Administration for Community Living / California Department of Aging
geographic_restrictions: Service area must align with AAA boundaries
mission_program_area: Evidence-based disease prevention programs for older adults
brief_justification: Title III-D funds evidence-based health programs. SNS could expand into health promotion services.
special_notes: Requires evidence-based program implementation. Partner with health organizations.

opportunity_name: AARP Foundation - Capacity Building Grants
deadline: No set RFA schedule - sign up for updates
mission_program_area: Organizational capacity for serving older adults with low income
brief_justification: AARP Foundation concentrates on 22 states with high senior poverty - CA is priority. No unsolicited apps but sign up for RFAs.
special_notes: Sign up for distribution list. Recent $1.5M+ in CA wildfire relief grants.

opportunity_name: Elder Justice Innovation Grants (HHS-2025-ACL-AOA-EJIG-0023)
mission_program_area: Prevention of elder abuse, neglect, exploitation
brief_justification: ACL released $60M in new grants Sept 2025. SNS could incorporate elder justice into I&R services.
source_of_information: HHS press release, ACL Grants Dashboard
special_notes: Part of $1.1B FY2025 ACL funding release. Check for current open opportunities.

opportunity_name: The SCAN Foundation - Equity Community Organizing (ECO) Groups
mission_program_area: Community organizing, health equity for older adults, policy advocacy
brief_justification: SCAN Foundation champions CA Master Plan for Aging. ECO Groups address health inequities - 70+ orgs applied for 4 slots.
special_notes: Recent $225K grant to Healthcare Foundation Northern Sonoma. Very competitive but high impact.

opportunity_name: ACL Chronic Disease Self-Management Education Programs
mission_program_area: Evidence-based health promotion, chronic disease management for seniors
brief_justification: Falls prevention, diabetes management programs align with health coordination services. Note: FY2026 budget proposes reduction.
special_notes: May require partnership with health organizations. Watch for FY2026 appropriations.

opportunity_name: David and Lucile Packard Foundation - Local Grantmaking (Food and Shelter)
geographic_restrictions: San Mateo, Santa Clara, Santa Cruz, San Benito, Monterey Counties
mission_program_area: Food and shelter, children and youth, arts, conservation
brief_justification: Packard has $8B+ assets, major CA funder. SNS in their geographic footprint (Santa Cruz, Monterey). Multi-year GOS available.
special_notes: SNS location in Soquel (Santa Cruz County) is within priority area. Build relationship first.

opportunity_name: Central Coast Commission for Senior Citizens - Title III Services RFP
funder_name: Central Coast Commission for Senior Citizens (Area 12 AAA)
deadline: FY 2025-2026 RFP was April 2025 (watch for next cycle)
geographic_restrictions: San Luis Obispo, Santa Barbara, Ventura Counties
mission_program_area: Adult day services, nutrition, ombudsman, caregiver counseling
brief_justification: Adjacent AAA region. FY25-26 included Ombudsman ($496K), Adult Day, Nutrition programs. Model for AAA contracting.
special_notes: Different AAA region but good model. Funding amounts significant.

opportunity_name: CalGrows Direct Care Workforce Training (Future Rounds)
mission_program_area: Direct care workforce training, stipends, career pathways for HCBS workers
brief_justification: Workforce development program for non-IHSS direct care workers. Could support SNS staff development.
special_notes: Previous round closed. Monitor for future opportunities.

opportunity_name: California Wellness Foundation - Community Well-being Grants
deadline: Not accepting LOIs after July 31, 2025 (check for 2026)
mission_program_area: Health equity, community well-being, disability justice
brief_justification: Cal Wellness awards $35M+ annually, 11,555 grants totaling $1.2B since 1992. Supports disability-led organizations.
special_notes: 2025 LOI window closed. Watch for 2026 approach announcement. Focus on racial and disability justice.

opportunity_name: William G. McGowan Charitable Fund
mission_program_area: Senior services, human services
brief_justification: Database shows $50K to TeleSpond Senior Services. $216.7M assets - substantial funder. National scope.
special_notes: Major funder with senior services track record. Website available for application info.

opportunity_name: California Office of Emergency Services - Listos California Program
deadline: Check Cal OES for current cycles
mission_program_area: Emergency preparedness for vulnerable populations including seniors and people with disabilities
brief_justification: Emergency preparedness for seniors and disabled. SNS serves vulnerable populations in disaster-prone area.
special_notes: Emphasize SNS role in coordinating services for disaster-vulnerable seniors.

opportunity_name: Silicon Valley Community Foundation - Community Lifeline Fund
deadline: Annual cycle (typically March) - 2025 closed, watch for 2026
geographic_restrictions: Santa Clara and San Mateo Counties primarily
mission_program_area: Safety-net services for low-income families, immigrants, seniors
brief_justification: Largest US community foundation. Community Lifeline Fund explicitly supports seniors. Grant amounts modest but door-opener.
special_notes: 2025 application closed. SNS serves multiple counties - focus on Santa Clara connection.

opportunity_name: The Don Yoder Foundation - Senior Services
mission_program_area: Senior services, meals programs
brief_justification: Database shows $5K to Council on Aging - Sonoma County Meals on Wheels. $5.7M assets. Northern CA focus.
special_notes: Small grants but active in senior services. Worth cultivation.

opportunity_name: CalAIM Enhanced Care Management - Community Supports
funder_name: California Department of Health Care Services
mission_program_area: Care management for high-need Medi-Cal populations including seniors
brief_justification: CalAIM Community Supports contract opportunities for CBOs. SNS coordination services align with ECM.
special_notes: Contract opportunity, not grant. Consider becoming ECM provider or Community Support provider.

opportunity_name: John A. Hartford Foundation - Fostering Social Connection Planning Grant
mission_program_area: Social connection programs for older adults and caregivers
brief_justification: Recent $1.1M grant to USAging for social connection replication. SNS provides coordination services aligned with this.
special_notes: USAging is intermediary. Consider application through network affiliation.

opportunity_name: Raymond and Joanne Lin Foundation
mission_program_area: Senior services, self-help programs
brief_justification: Database shows $6.4K to senior orgs including Self-Help for the Elderly. $1.25M assets. Smaller funder.
special_notes: Small grants. SF Bay Area senior services focus.

opportunity_name: California Health Care Foundation - Older Adults Program
mission_program_area: Age-friendly health systems, medical/LTSS integration, Medi-Cal improvements
brief_justification: CHCF co-funded ECO Groups with SCAN. Focus on Medi-Cal improvements and HCBS. Strategic partner opportunity.
special_notes: Works closely with SCAN Foundation. Consider joint approach or referral.

opportunity_name: Cal-COMPASS Alzheimer's Community Care Model (Future Rounds)
mission_program_area: Modernized Alzheimer's community care, adult day programs
brief_justification: Pilot program with Alzheimer's Day Programs. Consider if SNS expands dementia services.
special_notes: Current round closed. Watch for expansion.

opportunity_name: The SCAN Foundation - Policy and Systems Change Grants
mission_program_area: Long-term care policy, Medicare-Medicaid integration, multisector aging plans
brief_justification: Foundation founded 2008, deep CA roots. Champions Master Plan for Aging. Higher bar but transformational.
special_notes: Invitation only. Build relationship through MPA engagement and lived experience work.

opportunity_name: The Schmidbauer Family Foundation
mission_program_area: Senior services, community support
brief_justification: Database shows $5K to Humboldt Senior Resource Center. $16.9M assets, total giving $1.26M (34 grants).
special_notes: Humboldt County focus may limit fit. Strong CA funder.

opportunity_name: SAMHSA Older Adults Mental Health and Suicide Prevention
funder_name: Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration
deadline: Check SAMHSA Grants Dashboard for 2026 forecast
mission_program_area: Mental health services, suicide prevention for older adults
brief_justification: SAMHSA has senior-specific toolkits. Would require mental health programming expansion.
special_notes: Consider partnership with behavioral health provider. SAMHSA provides toolkits for senior centers.

opportunity_name: Anderson Valley Foundation
mission_program_area: Senior services, animal welfare, various
brief_justification: Database shows $200K to Muttville Senior Dog Rescue (SF). $45M assets. Diverse grantmaking.
special_notes: Funded senior dog rescue in San Francisco. May consider CA senior services.

opportunity_name: Alphawood Foundation - LGBTQ+ Seniors
mission_program_area: LGBTQ+ seniors, social services
brief_justification: Database shows $40K to SAGE (LGBTQ+ elder services). $65.1M assets. Consider LGBTQ+ senior programming.
special_notes: Strong LGBTQ+ focus. Consider if SNS serves LGBTQ+ seniors.

opportunity_name: 2025-26 California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program (CSNSGP)
mission_program_area: Security improvements for nonprofits at risk of hate-based attacks
brief_justification: Database record. For security infrastructure. May apply if SNS facilities serve at-risk populations.
special_notes: Security-focused. Consider if serving targeted communities.

opportunity_name: Gary and Mary West Foundation - Aging in Place
mission_program_area: Successful aging, affordable health services, independence
brief_justification: $211M+ awarded since inception. Mission to enable seniors to age in place. Invitation only, San Diego based.
special_notes: Major funder but invitation only. Build visibility through West Health Institute partnerships.

opportunity_name: Permanent Local Housing Allocation (PLHA) 2024 NOFA
funder_name: Department of Housing and Community Development
mission_program_area: Housing for homeless, at-risk populations
brief_justification: Database shows $296M-$335M programs. Housing focus but seniors are priority population.
special_notes: Housing-focused. Consider if SNS works on senior housing issues.

opportunity_name: John A. Hartford Foundation - Age-Friendly Health Systems
mission_program_area: Age-friendly health systems (4Ms: Matters, Medication, Mentation, Mobility)
brief_justification: $656M+ invested in aging since 1982. Major national funder. Would need strong health system partnership.
special_notes: Recent $4.5M in grants. Focus on dementia care, social connection. Invitation only.

opportunity_name: 2025-2026 LSTA Community Impact Grants
mission_program_area: Community impact, library partnerships
brief_justification: Database record. Could support digital literacy, information services for seniors.
special_notes: Library Services and Technology Act funding. Consider library partnership.

opportunity_name: East Bay Foundation on Aging - Project Grants
funder_name: East Bay Community Foundation / East Bay Foundation on Aging
mission_program_area: Physical and emotional health of underserved seniors, advocacy
brief_justification: EBFA granted $727,500 in 2024-2025. Focus on Oakland seniors. Geographic mismatch but model for other funders.
special_notes: Oakland-specific. Study their model for similar regional foundations.

opportunity_name: NIH Advancing Healthcare for Older Adults from Populations that Experience Health Disparities (R01)
mission_program_area: Health disparities research for older adults
brief_justification: Database record. Research grant requiring academic partnership. SNS could be community partner.
special_notes: Requires research institution partnership. Consider UC Santa Cruz or Stanford collaboration.

opportunity_name: Ralph M. Parsons Foundation - Human Services Grants
mission_program_area: Human services for vulnerable populations including seniors, homeless, foster youth
brief_justification: Largest area of Parsons giving is Human Services including seniors. LA County geographic restriction limits fit.
special_notes: LA County only. Study model for Central Coast equivalent foundations.

opportunity_name: NIH Effectiveness Trials for Post-Acute Interventions (R01)
mission_program_area: Post-acute care research, care transitions for older adults
brief_justification: Research focus on care transitions. SNS could be community partner for care coordination research.
special_notes: Academic partnership required. Consider hospital/health system collaboration.

opportunity_name: Marin Community Foundation - Buck Family Fund
geographic_restrictions: Marin County (and some outside county serving Marin)
mission_program_area: Community-led initiatives supporting marginalized residents
brief_justification: MCF has $3B+ assets, top 10 US community foundation. Buck Family Fund distributes $25-30M annually. Geographic constraint for SNS.
special_notes: Would need to serve Marin County residents. Consider if SNS expands service area.

opportunity_name: San Diego Seniors Community Foundation - Empowerment Grants
mission_program_area: Senior center programs, social engagement, community support
brief_justification: 2025 Empowerment Grants totaled $125,950. Model program but San Diego geographic focus.
special_notes: Study as model. SNS could create similar regional foundation in Central Coast.

opportunity_name: AHRQ Health Services Research Projects (R01)
funder_name: Agency for Health Care Research and Quality
mission_program_area: Health services research, quality improvement
brief_justification: Research-focused grants. SNS could partner with academic institution for evaluation study.
special_notes: Would require academic partnership. Better for evaluation/research component.

opportunity_name: Weingart Foundation - Human Services/Aging Grants
geographic_restrictions: Southern California (LA, Orange, Riverside, San Bernardino, Ventura)
mission_program_area: Racial, social, economic justice; health and human services
brief_justification: Priority includes those disadvantaged by age. Southern CA geographic focus limits fit for SNS.
special_notes: Invitation only. Southern CA focus. Study approach for future expansion.
